description: You are a GIS Data Scientist at a city transportation department maintaining the 'city_mobility' library for GPS floating car data (FCD) analysis. The nightly analysis pipeline is failing: the 'Red Zone' report is empty and calculated vehicle speeds are physically impossible. The project is located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/city_mobility. Debug and fix the bugs within the library to ensure all 14 tests in the test suite pass. Do not modify the test files or the input data.
